Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LENDINGHOME FUNDING CORPORATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar. Defendant Sohail Mobasseri filed for bankruptcy. In addition, this is a foreclosure related matter that should have been calendared in department 501 per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)

PLAINTIFF LENDINGHOME FUNDING CORPORATION'S Motion For Issue And Monetary Sanctions.

Off calendar. Defendant filed for bankruptcy.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LENDINGHOME FUNDING CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant And For Monetary Sanctions

The Court grants the unopposed motion to compel Defendant's deposition and awards sanctions in the amount of $3,362.36. Prevailing party is to prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (506/CVA)

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Adam M. Forest of Scale LLP, Telephone (415)735-5933, appearing for Plaintiff LendingHome Funding Corp.;
Mark A. Birfman of Birfman Law Corporation, Telephone (818)920-2133 ext. 104, appearing for Defendant Sohail Mobasseri;

Matter is heard and the Court makes the following ruling:

PLAINTIFF LENDINGHOME FUNDING CORPORATION'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions.

Motion is deemed admitted and is denied as moot. Request for monetary sanctions denied.

Jude Pro Tem Jeffrey Wohl is to prepare order.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
